_description: 2D6 roll table for getting replacement characters. Number of attempts per turn = 1 + milestones achieved. All new characters enter with Loyalty: Committed.
_notes: Can also dismiss characters at this stage. Dismissed characters cannot return. Civvy Heroic Promotion: if civvies participated, pick one non-casualty, roll 2D6 — on 10-12 they become a grunt.

replacement_roll.description: Roll 1D6 again: 1-2 Trooper, 3-4 Scientist, 5-6 Scout. Each begins with the standard profile.
You may take a replacement of your choice.

civvy_heroic_promotion.description: If any civvies participated in the mission, pick one who did not become a casualty and roll 2D6. On 10-12, they are added to your grunts.

alternate_advancement_options._description: A character eligible for advancement may instead choose one of these options.

options.description: If currently Disloyal or Committed, increase Loyalty to Loyal.
If the character is a scientist, gain 3 Research Points instead.
If the character is a scout, gain 3 units of Raw Materials instead.
